SEARCH

Package com.nib.commons.esql

package com.nib.commons.esql
API classes for Embedded SQL (E/SQL) integration and runtime support.

This package provides the necessary infrastructure to emulate Embedded SQL constructs within the Java environment. It serves as a bridge between the procedural logic and JDBC-compliant databases.

Key Components

  • Connectivity: DatabaseConnection manages the JDBC connection, while DatabaseFamily identifies the specific database vendor.
  • Execution: NSqlCommand and NSqlCursor encapsulate the logic for preparing statements, executing queries, and managing database cursors.
  • Host Variables: Classes such as NHostVariable and NHostVariablesList handle the binding and mapping of application data to SQL parameters and result sets.
  • Diagnostics: The Sqlca (SQL Communication Area) captures execution feedback, including error codes and status indicators.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.nib.commons
    Common utilities and core runtime components for the NIB application framework.
  • Class
    Description
    AbstractNSqlCommand
    This abstract class represents a SQL command.
    DatabaseConnection
    DatabaseConnection represents a JDBC connection to a relational database.
    DatabaseFamily
    DatabaseFamily represents the type of database.
    DummyDatabaseConnection
     
    NHostVariable
    This class represents a host variable in SQL.
    NHostVariablesList
     
    NHostVariablesMap
    This class extends HashMap and is used to map a String key to an NHostVariable object.
    NSqlCommand
    NSqlCommand class extends AbstractNSqlCommand and provides methods to prepare and execute SQL commands.
    NSqlCursor
    NSqlCursor class extends NSqlCommand and provides methods to open, fetch, and close a cursor.
    NSqlException
    NSqlException class extends Exception and provides a custom exception for SQL errors.
    Sqlca
    Sqlca class extends NGroup and provides a structure for SQL communication area.
    SqlCondition
    SqlCondition is an enum that provides the possible conditions for SQL errors.
    SqlConditionException
    SqlConditionException class extends ContextException and provides a custom exception for SQL conditions.
    SqlError
    SqlError class provides a structure for SQL errors.
    SqlWarningException
